title: galinsoga parviflora subsp. hispida
intro: Galinsoga parviflora subsp. hispida, also known as prickly galinsoga, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. Prickly galinsoga is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of prickly galinsoga include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat specific health conditions and promote overall well-being.
